chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1486 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on CMA 6887/2023 2.For hearing of main case. 14-03-2024 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Rehmat Ali Shaikh, Advocate for respondents No.12 to 14. Mr. Qadeer Ahmed Shaikh, Advocate for respondents No.7,8,10&11. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Fayaz Ahmed Mangi, Secretary, D.R.T.A, Sukkur, Waheed Ali, Secretary, District Regional Transport Authority, Khairpur and SIP-Abdul Rahman, SHO, P.S, Hingorja. ***** Secretary, DRTA, Khairpur and respondent No.9 have filed comments. This petition is disposed of with consent, whereby Secretaries, District Regional Transport Authority, Khairpur and Sukkur undertake to provide required permission to the petitioner for running a booking office with facility of pick and drop of the passengers for coaches/buses subject to fulfillment of all the requirements, for example, establishing separate waiting rooms for ladies and males along with attached washroom. Petitioner undertakes to do the same and police officials are directed to maintain law and order situation and if any one including petitioner and private respondents takes law in his hand, action shall be taken against him strictly in accordance with law. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
